flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northeast Community College rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.7k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeast Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northeast Community College are 10% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($42.6k vs $38.8k).
